label: Structure Prediction (Non-Target)
description: Predicts the 3D structure of the non-target protein (RPS6KB2) using AlphaFold, providing the structural input needed for non-target docking and selectivity assessment.

defaultInputs.name: Protein List
defaultInputs.tooltip: FASTA sequence(s) of the non-target protein(s) for structure prediction.

defaultOutputs.name: fasta
defaultOutputs.tooltip: Full FASTA amino acid sequence of the non-target protein.

defaultOutputs.name: structure_3d
defaultOutputs.tooltip: URL to the predicted 3D structure PDB file for the non-target protein.

configSchema.label: Protein List (Paste)
configSchema.tooltip: Paste protein FASTA sequence for structure prediction.

configSchema.label: Prediction Method
configSchema.tooltip: Select the protein structure prediction method.

configSchema.label: Include Confidence Scores
configSchema.tooltip: Include pLDDT and other confidence metrics in the output.
